title: telemetry-otel — retention windows
description: This module has no data store — spans + metrics are pushed to the OTLP collector which owns retention. The upstream backend (Grafana Tempo, DataDog, Honeycomb, etc) enforces retention windows.
compliance_regimes_referenced: gdpr Art. 5 (storage limitation — the OTel backend must comply, not us)
gdpr Art. 30 (records of processing — workspace_id + workspace_id in span attributes count as processing)

hot.description: backend-defined (e.g. Tempo default 14d, DataDog default 15 months for traces summary + 5 days for full)

note: PII handling requires care: our SpanAttributeRedactor strips PII fields (email, phone, IP if config'd) before export. This is our part of the retention story — minimising what leaves the app.
